creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
ffplay were built in the way below.

gcc42 -DHAVE_AV_CONFIG_H -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE
-D_ISOC9X_SOURCE -I.
-I"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27" -O2
-fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=prescott -O2
-I/usr/local/include/vorbis -msse -I/usr/local/include
-fomit-frame-pointer -Wdeclaration-after-statement -Wall -Wno-switch
-Wdisabled-optimization -Wpointer-arith -Wredundant-decls
-Wno-pointer-sign -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -O3 -fno-math-errno
 -I/usr/local/include/SDL -I/usr/local/include -D_GNU_SOURCE=1
-D_REENTRANT  -c -o ffplay.o ffplay.c
ffplay.c: In function 'main':
ffplay.c:2547: warning: assignment discards qualifiers from pointer
target type
gcc42
-L"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libpostproc
-L"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libswscale
-L"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavdevice
-L"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavformat
-L"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavcodec
-L"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavutil
-L/usr/local/lib -la52 -rdynamic -export-dynamic -Wl,--warn-common
-Wl,--as-needed
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libpostproc
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libswscale
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavfilter
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavdevice
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavformat
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavcodec
-Wl,-rpath-link,"/usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2008-07-27"/libavutil
-Wl,-Bsymbolic -o ffplay_g ffplay.o cmdutils.o -lpostproc -lswscale
-lavdevice -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -L/usr/local/lib
-L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib  -pthread  -lz -lbz2
-lm -la52 -lfaad -ltheora -logg -lvorbisenc -lvorbis -logg -lx264 -lm
 -L/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lSDL -pthread
cp -p ffplay_g ffplay
strip ffplay

And, all of log also is attached.
